docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,501.10 FILED BY CEDENO, CINTHYA AS TO DEFENDANT SIMSEK, HAMZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
